results.title: Hyundai Metaplant suppliers announce Bryan County facilities
results.snippet: Two Hyundai Motor Group Metaplant America suppliers announced new facilities in Bryan County, Georgia, creating 800 jobs.

results.title: Governor announces $200 million EV battery materials plant
results.snippet: Example Battery Company will invest $200 million in a battery materials facility in Bryan County, Georgia.

results.title: SK Battery America expands Commerce plant
results.snippet: SK Battery America is expanding its EV battery cell plant in Commerce, Jackson County, Georgia.

results.title: Ascend Elements opens battery recycling facility in Covington
results.snippet: Ascend Elements opened a battery materials and recycling facility in Covington, Georgia.

results.title: HL-GA Battery Company hiring for Bryan County plant
results.snippet: HL-GA Battery Company, the Hyundai-LGES joint venture, is hiring 400 workers for its battery cell plant.

results.title: Hyundai Metaplant suppliers announce Bryan County facilities (tracked link)
results.snippet: Duplicate of the first result with tracking parameters, for normalization tests.

results.title: Kia Georgia begins EV9 production in West Point
results.snippet: Kia Georgia started production of the EV9 electric SUV at its West Point, Georgia plant.

results.title: Rivian Georgia plant construction update
results.snippet: Rivian's electric vehicle plant at Stanton Springs continues construction in Morgan and Walton counties.

results.title: Anovion breaks ground on Bainbridge graphite plant
results.snippet: Anovion is building a synthetic graphite anode materials plant in Bainbridge, Georgia for EV batteries.

results.snippet: A blog roundup of EV job postings across Georgia.

results.title: Duckyang opens Savannah-area seat plant for Metaplant
results.snippet: Duckyang opened a seat assembly plant near Savannah supplying Hyundai Motor Group Metaplant America.

results.title: Qcells Cartersville expansion and Georgia clean energy jobs
results.snippet: Qcells is expanding manufacturing in Cartersville, Bartow County, Georgia.

results.title: Aurubis Richmond copper recycling plant update
results.snippet: Aurubis Richmond is commissioning its copper recycling facility in Augusta, Georgia.

results.title: EV charging network grows in Atlanta
results.snippet: Charging infrastructure companies are expanding EV charging stations across Atlanta, Georgia.
